description: Next.js pages and client-facing components must not import database clients or repository internals directly.

forbiddenImports.message: Next.js UI surfaces must call a service/server boundary instead of importing database packages.
Next.js UI surfaces must not deep-import repository/database internals.

pass.content:
import { loadDashboard } from '@/service/dashboard';
export default async function Page() { return null; }

fail.content:
import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
export default async function Page() { return null; }
